dashboard.selectChapterPrompt: Select a chapter to get started.
dashboard.manageCoachesDesc: View and update coach profiles, certifications, and specializations.
dashboard.editContentDesc: Update your website text, images, and translations.
dashboard.deployWebsiteDesc: Publish your latest content changes to the live website.
dashboard.inviteTeamDesc: Invite new content creators, coaches, or leads to your chapter.
dashboard.empoweringLeaders: Empowering leaders through action learning and global connection.

chapters.title: Chapters
chapters.noChaptersDesc: Create your first chapter to start building the global network.

coaches.title: Coaches
coaches.noCoachesDesc: Add your first coach to start building the directory.
coaches.notApprovedWarning: This coach will not appear in the public directory until approved.

events.title: Events
events.noEventsDesc: Create your first event to share with your community.

clients.title: Client Organizations
clients.description: Manage partner and client logos displayed on your website.
clients.noClientsDesc: Add client organizations to showcase on your chapter website.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Manage client testimonials for your chapter.
testimonials.noTestimonialsDesc: Add your first testimonial to showcase on your chapter website.

deployments.title: Deployments
deployments.manage: Manage and track website deployments for {name}.
deployments.noDeploymentsDesc: Click "Deploy Now" to publish your chapter website.
deployments.notProvisioned: This chapter has not been provisioned yet. A Super Admin must provision the chapter before deploying.
deployments.notProvisionedTrigger: This chapter has not been provisioned yet. Contact a Super Admin to provision the chapter first.

auth.signInSubtitle: Manage your chapter, coaches, and content
auth.invitationPrompt: Received an invitation? Check your email for the signup link.

settings.title: Chapter Settings
settings.configure: Configure {name}'s branding, contact info, and languages.
settings.manageLanguages: Manage the languages your chapter publishes content in. Translated content can be created using AI translation or written manually.
settings.aiCoachMatchingDesc: When enabled, your chapter's coach directory page shows a "Find Your Coach" widget that uses AI to match visitors with the right coach based on their needs.
settings.aiCoachMatchingWidgetDesc: Visitors can describe what they need and get personalized coach recommendations.
settings.contactAdmin: Contact a Super Admin to change the chapter name.

aiEditor.title: AI Editor
aiEditor.description: Start an editing session, send prompts to iterate on changes, then deploy when you're happy with the preview.
aiEditor.readyToEditDesc: Start a session to create an isolated branch. You can then send multiple prompts, preview changes, and deploy when ready.
aiEditor.previewReady: Preview is ready for your review
aiEditor.promptDescription: AI will edit your chapter's website files. You'll preview changes before they go live.
aiEditor.enterPromptToStart: Session is ready. Enter a prompt to start editing.
aiEditor.placeholder: e.g., Change the hero title to 'Welcome to WIAL Nigeria' and make the CTA button green...

profile.noProfileLinked: No coach profile is linked to your account.
